attributes.title: [InfluxDB OTel] Query & Tasks
attributes.description: Query controller load, memory budget, stage durations, task scheduler execution, and task executor saturation.

params.markdown:
## [InfluxDB OTel] Query & Tasks

This dashboard focuses on query execution and task scheduling:
- Query controller: active queries by stage, memory budget
- Query throughput and stage durations
- Task scheduler: execution count, failures, schedule delay
- Task executor: busy workers, promise queue usage

query.esql:
TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE qc_all_active IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_all_active))

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE qc_all_active IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_all_active))

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE qc_memory_unused_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS unused = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_memory_unused_bytes))

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE qc_memory_unused_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS unused = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_memory_unused_bytes))

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE qc_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = MAX(qc_requests_total)

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE qc_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = MAX(qc_requests_total)

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE task_scheduler_total_execution_calls IS NOT NULL
| STATS executions = MAX(task_scheduler_total_execution_calls)

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE task_scheduler_total_execution_calls IS NOT NULL
| STATS executions = MAX(task_scheduler_total_execution_calls)

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE task_scheduler_total_execute_failure IS NOT NULL
| STATS failures = MAX(task_scheduler_total_execute_failure)

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE task_scheduler_total_execute_failure IS NOT NULL
| STATS failures = MAX(task_scheduler_total_execute_failure)

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE task_executor_workers_busy IS NOT NULL
| STATS busy = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(task_executor_workers_busy))

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE task_executor_workers_busy IS NOT NULL
| STATS busy = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(task_executor_workers_busy))

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE qc_compiling_active IS NOT NULL OR qc_queueing_active IS NOT NULL OR qc_executing_active IS NOT NULL
| STATS compiling = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_compiling_active)), queueing = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_queueing_active)), executing = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_executing_active)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE qc_compiling_active IS NOT NULL OR qc_queueing_active IS NOT NULL OR qc_executing_active IS NOT NULL
| STATS compiling = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_compiling_active)), queueing = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_queueing_active)), executing = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_executing_active)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE qc_memory_unused_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS unused = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_memory_unused_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE qc_memory_unused_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS unused = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(qc_memory_unused_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE task_executor_workers_busy IS NOT NULL OR task_executor_promise_queue_usage IS NOT NULL OR task_executor_total_runs_active IS NOT NULL
| STATS workers_busy = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(task_executor_workers_busy)), queue_usage = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(task_executor_promise_queue_usage)), runs_active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(task_executor_total_runs_active)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE task_executor_workers_busy IS NOT NULL OR task_executor_promise_queue_usage IS NOT NULL OR task_executor_total_runs_active IS NOT NULL
| STATS workers_busy = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(task_executor_workers_busy)), queue_usage = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(task_executor_promise_queue_usage)), runs_active = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(task_executor_total_runs_active)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE task_scheduler_total_execution_calls IS NOT NULL OR task_scheduler_total_execute_failure IS NOT NULL
| STATS executions = MAX(task_scheduler_total_execution_calls), failures = MAX(task_scheduler_total_execute_failure) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE task_scheduler_total_execution_calls IS NOT NULL OR task_scheduler_total_execute_failure IS NOT NULL
| STATS executions = MAX(task_scheduler_total_execution_calls), failures = MAX(task_scheduler_total_execute_failure) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE boltdb_reads_total IS NOT NULL OR boltdb_writes_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS reads = MAX(boltdb_reads_total), writes = MAX(boltdb_writes_total) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE boltdb_reads_total IS NOT NULL OR boltdb_writes_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS reads = MAX(boltdb_reads_total), writes = MAX(boltdb_writes_total) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE go_memstats_heap_inuse_bytes IS NOT NULL OR go_memstats_heap_sys_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS heap_inuse = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(go_memstats_heap_inuse_bytes)), heap_sys = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(go_memstats_heap_sys_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-influxdb.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "influxdb.otel"
| WHERE go_memstats_heap_inuse_bytes IS NOT NULL OR go_memstats_heap_sys_bytes IS NOT NULL
| STATS heap_inuse = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(go_memstats_heap_inuse_bytes)), heap_sys = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(go_memstats_heap_sys_bytes)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC
